_comment: MCP server configuration template. Copy this to .mcp.json in your project root and replace PLACEHOLDER values. Keep .mcp.json in .gitignore — it contains secrets.

_instructions.slack: Replace SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL_PLACEHOLDER with your Slack Incoming Webhook URL (https://api.slack.com/messaging/webhooks)
_instructions.sentry: Replace SENTRY_DSN_PLACEHOLDER with your Sentry DSN (found under Project Settings → Client Keys in your Sentry dashboard)

slack.description: Slack Incoming Webhook for notifications. Replace URL with your webhook endpoint.

sentry.description: Sentry DSN for error tracking. Replace URL with your project DSN.
